items.name: The Railroad Flag Shoulder Patch
items.description:
The Railroad is a secretive underground network dedicated to freeing Generation 3 synths from the Institute. Its true origins are unclear, but records confirm it was active by 2266. After a devastating Institute raid nearly destroyed the group, surviving members rebuilt with strict operational security, safehouses, dead drops, and a layered cell structure. Under leaders like Wyatt, Pinky Thompson, and eventually Desdemona, the Railroad refined its methods, expanded its intelligence network, and recovered powerful assets like the Switchboard and P.A.M. By 2287, the Railroad had become the Commonwealth’s most determined force fighting for synth liberation.

1:2 Proportion 

Shoulder patches: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Shoulder+Patch&Category=11&Subcategory=23&CreatorName=titanite+Holdings+ugc+group&salesTypeFilter=1

items.description:

This cute reindeer shoulder pet features tiny antlers and big cartoon eyes, perfect for woodland outfits, cozy avatars, winter builds, and forest-style characters.
Designed for R15 and classic blocky avatars.
Great for deer plush lovers, 99 Nights inspired outfits, cute shoulder pets, and animal accessory collectors.
